description: You are an IT Project Manager launching the "Phoenix Migration" cloud infrastructure project. Establish the project workspace in Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) consisting of a private channel named 'phoenix-migration' (Topic: 'Cloud Infrastructure Migration | Q1-Q2 2026 | PM: admin', Description: 'Main coordination channel for the Phoenix cloud migration project') and three public sub-channels: 'phoenix-frontend', 'phoenix-backend', and 'phoenix-devops'.
